# college-rowing-team
## Challenge Overview
I just joined my college's rowing team! To make a good first impression, I started sending my teammates positive automated messages every day. I even send them flags from time to time!

Challenge link: https://learn.cylabacademy.org/library/212?page=38
<img width="1007" height="700" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6a681708-c2e8-4eb4-924d-d20ab0a833b2" />

## Solution

This challenge is similar to [this](https://github.com/qiarhadempta/PicoCTF-Write-Up/blob/main/Cryptography/Hard/miniRSA.md) challenge. The only difference is, in this challenge we are given some encrypted RSA messages, and all of these messages were encrypted using the same and small e value, which is 3.

Here, I'm using this python script 

```python
m = 
e = 3
n = 

# Hitung c = (m^e) mod n
c = pow(m, e, n)

print("Ciphertext (c) adalah:")
print(c)
```

Try to insert every RSA value, and we will get the flag.

Flag: `picoCTF{1_gu3ss_p30pl3_p4d_m3ss4g3s_f0r_4_r34s0n}`

[uodate soon]
